title: Creatures+ Animated
description: Creatures+, but it works with Fresh Animations!
body:
Creatures+ works with Fresh Animations now!

Just apply this resource pack above Fresh animations, and you'll have both the variants and the fancy movement.
![Frozen Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ywNZ0vbS/images/084a39b42c643009dffb37817b6ce1a0ba31472a.png)
![Dogs!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ywNZ0vbS/images/7d8400af9f9344b26abb54832547850ce9e358a0.png)

Fresh Animations
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations
![Fresh Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/50dA9Sha/a49a324c9210aaf7f5899199af2eaf6ff345b4ef.png)

Original Creatures+:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creatures+
